title: Chapter 1000 Summary
main_description: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
key_events: The Worst Generation Stands Before Kaido and Big Mom
